\tzpentry{ID4334}{Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4334 introduces Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$T_{eff} = T \times \exp[-\pi \times N_{kiss}]$
\]
